name: variant
description: Visual variant. Mirrors Button vocabulary so chips and buttons read as the same family.

name: gradientEnd
description: End-stop color for the `gradient` variant. Defaults to the `--gradient-end` token.

name: size
description: Predefined size matching Button's scale (chip glyph proportions are tighter).

name: shape
description: Default = pill (chip identity). `square` = `var(--radius)` corners. `circle` = round icon-only chip.

name: active
description: Pressed / selected look — for filter and toggle chips. Pairs with `onclick`.

name: closeAriaLabel
description: Aria-label for the close button. Override for localized labels.

name: onclick
description: Click handler. Promotes the chip body to a real `<button>`.
